title: Help one of our tribe affected by the Southport stabbings 💔💔

excerpt: Trigger warning for this if you're easily upset but there has been um an attack in the UK a few weeks ago this was in Southport and three children were killed and multiple were injured now one of those families is one of our tribe she is a Medical Aesthetics practitioner in South…

segments.text: trigger warning for this if you're easily upset but there has been um an attack in the UK a few weeks ago this was in Southport and three children were killed and multiple were injured now one of those families is one of our tribe she is a Medical Aesthetics practitioner in Southport and both of her children were unfortunately badly injured in this attack they did survive um some horrible injuries but um I've been talking to her on and off over the last few weeks and I persuaded her what we should do is let her feel the love of our community so both her and her husband are affected they're both solar preneurs like many of us and their businesses are really struggling they are unable to focus on the normal stuff which we do dayto day because they have two traumatized children and they themselves as I said dad was actually one of the first on the scene he actually had to step over unimaginable scenes to get to his daughter and they are really struggling as a family to uh to basically keep going with the basic stuff so what I

thought we should do as a community show them some love and do a go fund me so we can give them some rest bite for a few months so they don't have to worry about their businesses because you know what it's like as a solopreneur if you're not driving it every single day no money comes in there's been no help from the governments they're not getting Psychological Services like you might imagine for PTSD it's just them and I don't really like that story I think we should show them that we're all in this together so if you would like to contribute click on the link that's in my bio there's a GoFundMe with a Target that I think will make a tremendous difference to the family but most of all I really want those little girls to know that there's love in the world and that they are loved by the whole society as not just about one crazy man and so anyway I hope that makes a difference click on the link sign up give or if you can't afford to give you can always help by sharing and if you um and then give whatever you can afford to help this family it doesn't matter how much it's also symbolic in terms of just showing them that there but uh all you need to do is click on
